query:
SELECT 'experiences' as tabla, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(isPresentialSale) as en_tpv FROM experiences
UNION ALL
SELECT 'packs', COUNT(*), SUM(isPresentialSale) FROM packs
UNION ALL
SELECT 'room_types', COUNT(*), SUM(isPresentialSale) FROM room_types
UNION ALL
SELECT 'spa_treatments', COUNT(*), SUM(isPresentialSale) FROM spa_treatments;
